name: io.github.andriyshevchenko/sensorium-mcp
description: MCP server with 5-layer persistent memory, voice analysis, Telegram remote control, and task scheduler for AI assistants
title: Sensorium MCP

environmentVariables.name: OPENAI_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: OpenAI API key for voice transcription (Whisper), TTS, and memory consolidation

environmentVariables.name: CONSOLIDATION_MODEL
environmentVariables.description: OpenAI model for memory consolidation (default: gpt-4o-mini)

environmentVariables.name: MCP_HTTP_PORT
environmentVariables.description: If set, starts HTTP/SSE transport on this port instead of stdio

environmentVariables.name: WAIT_TIMEOUT_MINUTES
environmentVariables.description: How long to wait for messages before timeout (default: 120)
